category_sources: Official Savannah project page at https://savannah.nongnu.org/projects/unac and source repository identify the unac project.
source_facts.description says it is a C library and command that removes accents from a string.
display_name_sources: Official Savannah project is named unac at https://savannah.nongnu.org/projects/unac.
docs_sources: No dedicated docs domain was found; official homepage is the best official documentation surface.
source_facts.homepage is the official Savannah project page; Savannah links the official homepage https://www.nongnu.org/unac/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was determined from the official Savannah Git page https://savannah.nongnu.org/git/?group=unac, which provides the unac Git repository and browser link.
tags_sources: Official Savannah project and repository identify unac as the source project.
source_facts.description says C library and command that removes accents from strings.
